chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1418 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.6004/2023 (Ex.A) 3. For orders on CMA No.6005/2023 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 17.04.2025 On 10.04.2025, the following order was passed;- “On 11.03.2025 Counsel for the petitioners sought time for preparation. Today neither petitioners nor their Counsel is in attendance. This Petition is liable to be dismissed; however, in the interest of justice, adjourned to 17.04.2025. Let intimation notice be issued to the Counsel for the Petitioners for the next date of hearing.” Today neither petitioners nor their Counsel has appeared to pursue the instant Constitutional Petition. The conduct of the petitioners and their Counsel prima-facie suggests that they are no more interested to proceed with this Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI
